message:
updated files to consume llmd model name and modelID

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -54,7 +54,7 @@ helm upgrade -i workload-variant-autoscaler ./wva-llmd-infra \
   --set variantAutoscaling.accelerator=L40S \
   --set variantAutoscaling.modelID=unsloth/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B \
   --set vllmService.enabled=true \
-  --set vllmService.nodePort=30000 \
+  --set vllmService.nodePort=30000
 ```
 
 ### INSTALL LLM-D

@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@ spec:
   scaleTargetRef:
     apiVersion: apps/v1
     kind: Deployment
-    name: ms-inference-scheduling-llm-d-modelservice-decode
+    name: {{ printf "ms-%s-llm-d-modelservice-decode" .Values.wva.baseName }}
   # minReplicas: 0  # scale to zero - alpha feature
   maxReplicas: {{ .Values.hpa.maxReplicas }}
   behavior:
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@ spec:
         name: inferno_desired_replicas
         selector:
           matchLabels:
-            variant_name: ms-inference-scheduling-llm-d-modelservice-decode
+            variant_name: {{ printf "ms-%s-llm-d-modelservice-decode" .Values.wva.baseName }}
       target:
         type: AverageValue
         averageValue: {{ .Values.hpa.targetAverageValue | quote }}

@@ -22,9 +22,9 @@ data:
       - model: llama0-70b
         slo-tpot: 80
         slo-ttft: 500
-      - model: unsloth/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B
-        slo-tpot: 9
-        slo-ttft: 1000
+      - model: {{ .Values.variantAutoscaling.modelID }}
+        slo-tpot: {{ .Values.variantAutoscaling.sloTpot }}
+        slo-ttft: {{ .Values.variantAutoscaling.sloTtft }}
   freemium.yaml: |
     name: Freemium
     priority: 10

@@ -4,10 +4,10 @@ metadata:
   name: vllm-service
   namespace: {{ .Values.llmd.namespace }}
   labels:
-    llm-d.ai/model: ms-inference-scheduling-llm-d-modelservice
+    llm-d.ai/model: {{ printf "ms-%s-llm-d-modelservice" .Values.wva.baseName }}
 spec:
   selector:
-    llm-d.ai/model: ms-inference-scheduling-llm-d-modelservice
+    llm-d.ai/model: {{ printf "ms-%s-llm-d-modelservice" .Values.wva.baseName }}
   ports:
     - name: vllm
       port: 8200

@@ -4,11 +4,11 @@ metadata:
   name: vllm-servicemonitor
   namespace: {{ .Values.wva.monitoringNamespace }}
   labels:
-    llm-d.ai/model: ms-inference-scheduling-llm-d-modelservice
+    llm-d.ai/model: {{ printf "ms-%s-llm-d-modelservice" .Values.wva.baseName }}
 spec:
   selector:
     matchLabels:
-      llm-d.ai/model: ms-inference-scheduling-llm-d-modelservice
+      llm-d.ai/model: {{ printf "ms-%s-llm-d-modelservice" .Values.wva.baseName }}
   endpoints:
   - port: vllm
     path: /metrics

@@ -24,8 +24,11 @@ llmd:
 hfToken: "" # required
 
 variantAutoscaling:
+  enabled: true
   accelerator: L40S
   modelID: "unsloth/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B"
+  sloTpot: 9
+  sloTtft: 1000
 
 hpa:
   maxReplicas: 10
